allProcesses.name: powershell.exe
allProcesses.command:
C:\WINDOWS\system32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\powershell.exe -NoProfile -NoLogo -InputFormat Text -ExecutionPolicy Unrestricted -Command "$OutputEncoding = [System.Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Console]::InputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8 ; Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | select-Object ProcessId,ParentProcessId,ExecutionState,Caption,CommandLine,ExecutablePath,UserModeTime,KernelModeTime,WorkingSetSize,Priority,PageFileUsage,
                @{n=\"CreationDate\";e={$_.CreationDate.ToString(\"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss\")}} | ConvertTo-Json -compress"
